message:
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'validated' read through pointer of type psmgr_session in psmgr_poll(). This type is freed in psmgr_create() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'validated' read through pointer of type psmgr_session in psmgr_poll(). This type is freed in psmgr_session_put() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
